title: Product name: Decision Explorer
question: What is the public name of the product for launch?
rationale: Name the public product 'Decision Explorer' to unify it with the viewer (already titled Decision Explorer), while keeping the /decision-tree command, the skills/decision-tree install path and the project folder unchanged, since renaming those is risky and user-facing in a different way.

tradeoffs.note: matches the viewer (already titled Decision Explorer), so the user-facing app and the product share one name
command and paths untouched, so nothing breaks; only docs, repo slug and the displayed name change
repo slug changes to Decision-Explorer, but GitHub redirects the old Decision-Tree URL
leaves two names - 'Decision Tree' the product vs 'Decision Explorer' the viewer - which reads as a mismatch
no repo rename or doc churn at all

options.label: Rename everything including the /decision-tree command and folder

tradeoffs.note: fully unified - even the command would read /decision-explorer
rewrites the install path, every hardcoded path and the session's working directory; high chance of breakage right before launch
